fields.description: Adding policies that can route reservations, and that then route applications to where the reservation have been placed.

comments.body:
This initial (rough) patch provides an idea of how we can: 
1) extend the FederationStateStore APIs (with memory implementation)
2) extend the FederationRouterPolicy APIs
3) implement (for all current Router policies) the handling of reservations
4) tests

This is probably worth splitting down to multiple patches, but I am uploading to start the discussion.
The current design covers the support for reservations *in a single sub-cluster*. Spanning reservations across sub-cluster is rather complex, and should come later (likely require an umbrella JIRA on its own).
I added to this also changes to the {{RouterPolicyFacade}} to support reservation routing, and fixed test wiring issues for the AMRMProxy side.
Marking as patch available to trigger initial runs of Yetus... this is a WIP.

slfan1989 closed pull request #4632: YARN-5871. [RESERVATION] Add support for reservation-based routing.

status.description: A patch for this issue has been uploaded to JIRA by a contributor.
status.name: Patch Available

comments.body:
This initial (rough) patch provides an idea of how we can: 
1) extend the FederationStateStore APIs (with memory implementation)
2) extend the FederationRouterPolicy APIs
3) implement (for all current Router policies) the handling of reservations
4) tests

This is probably worth splitting down to multiple patches, but I am uploading to start the discussion.
The current design covers the support for reservations *in a single sub-cluster*. Spanning reservations across sub-cluster is rather complex, and should come later (likely require an umbrella JIRA on its own).
I added to this also changes to the {{RouterPolicyFacade}} to support reservation routing, and fixed test wiring issues for the AMRMProxy side.
Marking as patch available to trigger initial runs of Yetus... this is a WIP.
